title: wilted crumbly portuguese strawberries tart
description: nutty, crumbly, adventurous portuguese dish featuring strawberries, deglaze-fond, jain-friendly
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine almond flour, caster sugar, and dried thyme; stir well.
Add softened butter to the bowl and mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and honey.
Pour the egg mixture over the almond flour mixture and stir until a dough is formed.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 180°C and roll out the dough to a thickness of 0.5 cm.
Transfer the dough to a 20cm tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake for 18 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and allow to cool for 5 minutes.
Slice the strawberries and arrange them over the cooled tart base.
Return to the oven and bake for a further 10 minutes or until strawberries are tender.
Deglaze the pan with port wine and brush over the strawberries.
